items.title: 7 visual fixes
items.body:
## DOCX Export — Visual Fixes

| # | Fix | Status |
|---|-----|--------|
| 1 | Story table: no header row in right-panel key-value table | ✅ Fixed |
| 2 | Story table: separator line on both key AND value columns | ❌ Not fixed |
| 3 | DOCX inner table cells: no blue (#93c5fd) border from global CSS | ❌ Not fixed |
| 4 | Emoji icon alignment in DOCX | ✅ Fixed |
| 5 | Generate proper `.docx` OOXML format (not legacy `.doc`) | ✅ Fixed — PR #304 |
| 6 | Ghost MSO header/footer content appearing as b

items.title: Export Documentation + Layout Convention QA — 2026-02-24/25 (P6/P8)
items.full_title: TASK: Export Documentation + Layout Convention QA — 2026-02-24/25 (P6/P8)
items.body:
## Export Documentation + Layout Convention QA — 2026-02-24/25

### Summary
Combined 2-day sprint across knowledge-live (dev) and knowledge (prod) repos covering:
- **3 convention layouts formalized**: publication.html, default.html, three-zone @page model
- **PDF export pipeline**: single header liner, language bar, footer links, filename sanitization
- **DOCX export pipeline**: OOXML ZIP from scratch via altChunk, running header/footer, 8 major fixes
- **Dev→Prod promotion**: knowledge-live la

items.title: 3 convention layouts — publication.html / default.html / three-zone @page
items.full_title: DOC: 3 convention layouts — publication.html / default.html / three-zone @page
items.body: Formalize the 3 layout conventions with scope boundaries. Tracked as P8 documentation governance activity.

items.title: Dev→Prod layout promotion tracking — knowledge-live to knowledge core
items.full_title: TASK: Dev→Prod layout promotion tracking — knowledge-live to knowledge core
items.body: Track the complete dev→prod promotion cycle: 19 PRs on knowledge-live (dev) + 18 PRs on knowledge (prod). Harvest issues: #267, #268, #271.

items.title: Export Documentation QA complete — 37 PRs, DOCX+PDF production-ready
items.full_title: TASK: Export Documentation QA complete — 37 PRs, DOCX+PDF production-ready
items.body: Track the complete export QA cycle: 37 PRs across 2 repos (19 knowledge-live + 18 knowledge). DOCX: OOXML ZIP via altChunk. PDF: single header liner. Both production-ready.

items.title: diagnostic sur les diagrammes des pages web
items.full_title: diagnostic sur les diagrammes des pages web
items.body:
## Contexte

Effectuer un diagnostic complet des diagrammes (Mermaid et autres) présents sur les pages web du système de connaissances.

### Pages concernées

- FR: https://packetqc.github.io/knowledge/fr/publications/architecture-diagrams/full/
- EN: https://packetqc.github.io/knowledge/publications/architecture-diagrams/full/

## Objectif

Vérifier le rendu, la cohérence et la conformité des diagrammes sur les pages GitHub Pages publiées.

## Projet

P8 — Documentation System (#38)
